hero.title: Interactive Quizzes Made Simple
hero.subtitle: Create engaging quizzes, collect real-time responses, and visualize results instantly. Perfect for classrooms, meetings, and events.

features.title: Why Choose Swaya.me?
features.createQuizzesDesc: Build multiple-choice and word cloud questions in minutes. No technical skills required.
features.liveParticipationDesc: Participants join instantly with a simple code. No login required for audience members.
features.realTimeResultsDesc: See responses as they come in. Perfect for instant feedback and engagement.
features.wordCloudsDesc: Collect open-ended responses and visualize them as beautiful word clouds.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Join educators, trainers, and presenters using Swaya.me to make their sessions more interactive.

about.title: About Swaya.me
about.subtitle: A live audience engagement platform built for educators, trainers, and presenters who want real interaction — not just passive viewing.
about.whatBody1: Swaya.me is a real-time interactive quiz and polling platform. Hosts create sessions in minutes; audiences join instantly using a 6-digit code — no app download, no account, no friction.
about.whatBody2: Question types include multiple-choice quizzes with automatic scoring, live word clouds for open-ended responses, scale ratings, and free-text answers. Results are visualised live as participants respond, and full session reports can be exported in PDF, Word, PowerPoint, or Excel.
about.pricingBody: Swaya.me is completely free during its Beta phase. Paid pricing plans with higher limits and additional features will be introduced after Beta ends. All existing users will be notified before any changes take effect.
about.betaBody: Swaya.me is currently in Beta. The platform is actively developed and new features are released regularly. We welcome your feedback — use the in-app feedback option or contact us directly.
about.contactBody: We'd love to hear from you — feedback, bug reports, or business enquiries.
about.useCase1Desc: Run formative assessments, knowledge checks, and interactive revision sessions in classrooms of any size.
about.useCase2Desc: Keep workshop and training audiences engaged with live polls, quizzes, and word clouds.
about.useCase3Desc: Turn passive conference or webinar audiences into active participants with zero setup friction.
about.useCase4Desc: Run quick team pulse checks, icebreakers, or knowledge-sharing sessions with your organisation.
about.feature1: Multiple question types: MCQ, Word Cloud, Scale (1–5), Single-line and Paragraph text
about.feature2: Anonymous audience participation — no login required for participants
about.feature4: Leaderboard with scoring and time-based tiebreaking
about.feature5: Export session results as PDF, Word, PowerPoint, or Excel
about.feature6: Multi-language interface (English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Bengali, Gujarati, and more)
about.feature7: Quiz templates — create once, reuse across sessions
about.feature8: Tier-based plans for individuals, teams, and enterprises (post Beta)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Swaya.me, your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights in relation to it.
privacy.s1Body1: When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, and organisation name. We store quiz content you create, including questions, options, and session results.
privacy.s1Body2: Participants join sessions anonymously. We collect only the display name you optionally provide and your quiz responses. No login or personal account is required.
privacy.s1Body3: We collect standard server logs including IP addresses, browser type, and page interaction data for platform security and performance monitoring. We also track language preference selections to improve localisation.
privacy.s2Intro: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
privacy.s2li1: To operate and deliver the Swaya.me quiz and polling platform
privacy.s2li2: To authenticate registered users and manage their accounts
privacy.s2li3: To display quiz results and session reports to hosts
privacy.s2li4: To monitor platform performance, security, and reliability
privacy.s2li5: To improve and develop new features based on usage patterns
privacy.s2Note: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s3Body: We use browser session storage (not persistent cookies) to maintain your session as an audience participant during a quiz. Registered users use JWT tokens stored in localStorage for authentication. No third-party tracking cookies are set.
privacy.s4Body1: Registered user accounts and associated quiz data are retained for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and data by contacting
privacy.s4Body2: Anonymous participant responses are retained with the session record for the duration the host maintains their quiz history.
privacy.s5Body: We use industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption for all data in transit and hashed passwords for stored credentials. While we take reasonable precautions, no internet service can guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s6Body: Swaya.me is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided personal information, please contact us for removal.
privacy.s7Body: Swaya.me does not use third-party advertising services or sell data. We use infrastructure services (server hosting, database) that process data on our behalf under standard data processing agreements.
privacy.s8Body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at
privacy.s9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will update the 'Last updated' date at the top of this page. For significant changes, we will notify registered users by email.
privacy.s10Body: For any privacy-related questions or requests, please contact us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing or using Swaya.me, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before using the platform.
terms.s1Body1: Swaya.me is a live audience engagement and quiz platform. It allows registered hosts to create and run interactive sessions, and allows audience members to participate anonymously via a join code.
terms.s1Body2: The platform is currently in Beta. Features, limits, and pricing may change during the Beta period. We will notify users of significant changes before they take effect.
terms.s2Body: To create a host account, you must be at least 13 years of age. Audience participation does not require registration and has no age restriction beyond what the session host determines appropriate for their audience.
terms.s3Intro: When using Swaya.me, you agree not to:
terms.s3li1: Post or transmit content that is unlawful, harmful, abusive, defamatory, obscene, or otherwise objectionable
terms.s3li3: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to other accounts or platform systems
terms.s3li4: Use the platform to distribute spam, malware, or phishing content
terms.s3li5: Interfere with or disrupt the platform's services or infrastructure
terms.s3li6: Scrape or harvest data from the platform without authorisation
terms.s3Note: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s4Body1: You retain ownership of quiz content you create on Swaya.me. By using the platform, you grant us a limited licence to store, display, and process your content solely to deliver the service to you.
terms.s4Body2: You are responsible for ensuring your quiz content complies with applicable laws and does not infringe third-party rights.
terms.s5Body: Platform-provided quiz templates are made available for your use as a host. You may use, copy, and adapt these templates to create your own quizzes. We retain ownership of the original templates.
terms.s6Body: We aim to provide a reliable service, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. Swaya.me may be unavailable from time to time for maintenance or due to factors outside our control. We will endeavour to notify users in advance of planned downtime.
terms.s7Body1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Swaya.me and its operators are not liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the platform.
terms.s7Body2: Our total liability to you for any claim arising from use of the platform shall not exceed the amount you have paid us in the twelve months preceding the claim (or zero if you are on a free plan).
terms.s8Body: Swaya.me and its logo are owned by Chakrix. The platform software, design, and branding are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our platform software or branding without prior written permission.
terms.s9Body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify registered users by email before significant changes take effect. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.s10Body: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of India.
terms.s11Body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at
